title: Frontend Developer
description: We are seeking a Frontend Developer to design, build, and maintain responsive, user-friendly web interfaces. The role includes translating UI/UX designs into high-quality code, integrating APIs, optimizing performance, and ensuring accessibility across browsers and devices. You will collaborate with backend engineers and product teams to deliver clean, maintainable, and scalable front-end features.
requiredSkills: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), React, Responsive Design, REST APIs, Git

title: Backend Developer
description: We are seeking a Backend Developer to design, build, and maintain reliable server-side applications and APIs. The role includes developing RESTful services, integrating databases, optimizing performance, and ensuring security and scalability. You will collaborate with frontend engineers and product teams to deliver robust features, write clean and testable code, and contribute to system architecture decisions.
requiredSkills: Node.js, Express, REST APIs, SQL, MySQL, Authentication, Git

title: Instructor
description: We are seeking an Instructor to deliver engaging, student-centered instruction and develop lesson plans, assessments, and learning materials. The role includes classroom management, mentoring students, coordinating with department colleagues, and contributing to curriculum development and academic initiatives.
requiredSkills: Lesson Planning, Classroom Management, Curriculum Development, Communication, Assessment, Academic Writing, MS Office

title: Administrative Staff
description: We are seeking an Administrative Staff member to support daily office operations, handle records and documentation, coordinate schedules, and assist with finance and administrative tasks. The role requires strong organization, attention to detail, and effective communication with internal and external stakeholders.
requiredSkills: Office Administration, Records Management, Scheduling, Communication, Attention to Detail, MS Office, Basic Accounting
